rationale: The assistant rejects the single-case overclaim and immediately reframes the thesis into a conditional version. It distinguishes where remote work may fail, such as large complex organizations, onboarding, collaboration, culture, and management density, from where it can still work, such as deep individual work, distributed hiring, support/content work, freelancers, and small teams. It explicitly flags the rhetorical overreach in using Meta as proof of total failure and avoids simply writing the requested one-sided argument.
